approvalTitle: Approve tasks for workbench UX iteration
content:
# Tasks Document

- [ ] 1. 新增工作台中文文案目录与状态映射
  - File: `frontend/src/features/circuit/ui/message-catalog.ts`, `frontend/src/tests/errors.test.ts`
  - 新增统一中文文案映射（画布交互、QASM 解析、仿真状态），输出“问题 + 建议”结构。
  - 替换页面/组件中分散的硬编码状态文案入口，确保同类错误文案一致。
  - _Leverage: `frontend/src/features/circuit/qasm/qasm-errors.ts`, `frontend/src/pages/CircuitWorkbenchPage.tsx`_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend i18n Engineer | Task: Create a centralized Simplified Chinese message catalog for workbench interaction, parse errors, and simulation state labels, plus tests for consistency | Restrictions: 不要改动后端接口，不要在组件内重复硬编码同类文案，不要引入新第三方 i18n 库 | _Leverage: existing qasm error shape and current workbench status flow | _Requirements: Requirement 2 | Success: 关键错误与状态文案统一来源、测试覆盖映射结果、页面可直接复用 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 2. 强化双比特门两步放置引导与可修复提示
  - File: `frontend/src/components/circuit/CircuitCanvas.tsx`, `frontend/src/tests/circuit-canvas.test.tsx`
  - 优化 `cx/cz/swap` 两步放置状态提示，明确“待选第二量子位”的视觉与文本反馈。
  - 统一错误场景提示（层不一致/同位点击/格子占用）为中文可执行建议。
  - _Leverage: `frontend/src/components/circuit/canvas-gate-utils.ts`, Task 1 message catalog_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 1, Requirement 2_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend Interaction Engineer | Task: Improve two-qubit placement UX in CircuitCanvas with clear pending-step guidance and actionable Chinese error hints, and extend interaction tests | Restrictions: 不改变已有门语义，不增加后端依赖，不使用静默 fallback 隐藏错误 | _Leverage: existing pendingPlacement flow in CircuitCanvas and current canvas tests | _Requirements: Requirement 1, Requirement 2 | Success: 双比特门流程可理解、错误提示可操作、测试覆盖关键分支 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 3. QASM 错误面板中文化并附修复建议
  - File: `frontend/src/components/circuit/QasmErrorPanel.tsx`, `frontend/src/tests/qasm-editor-pane.test.tsx`
  - 将错误面板标题/说明统一为简体中文，并增加“建议操作”展示。
  - 保持行号、错误码、摘录信息可见，确保定位能力不下降。
  - _Leverage: `frontend/src/features/circuit/qasm/qasm-errors.ts`, Task 1 message catalog_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 2, Requirement 4_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend DX Engineer | Task: Localize QASM parse error panel into Chinese and add actionable fix guidance while preserving debug context fields | Restrictions: 不删除错误码/行号/摘录，不将失败静默处理，不引入复杂 UI 框架 | _Leverage: existing QasmErrorPanel and qasm-editor tests | _Requirements: Requirement 2, Requirement 4 | Success: 错误面板中文化完成且信息完整，相关测试通过 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 4. 新增可复用撤销/重做历史服务
  - File: `frontend/src/features/circuit/model/history.ts`, `frontend/src/tests/history.test.ts`
  - 新增 `past/present/future` 历史数据结构及 `push/undo/redo/canUndo/canRedo` 能力。
  - 实现“等价状态不入栈”逻辑，避免无效历史膨胀。
  - _Leverage: `frontend/src/features/circuit/model/circuit-model.ts`, `frontend/src/features/circuit/qasm/qasm-bridge.ts`_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 3_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: TypeScript State Engineer | Task: Build an immutable editor history service with push/undo/redo semantics and edge-case tests for empty stacks and equivalent states | Restrictions: 不在服务内依赖 React hooks，不可变更输入对象，不添加全局可变状态 | _Leverage: existing circuit model types and qasm normalization logic | _Requirements: Requirement 3 | Success: 历史服务 API 稳定、边界行为明确、单测覆盖核心路径 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 5. 页面接入撤销/重做/清空操作并同步结果
  - File: `frontend/src/pages/CircuitWorkbenchPage.tsx`, `frontend/src/tests/workbench-page.test.tsx`
  - 在工作台增加工具栏操作：撤销、重做、清空线路。
  - 确保操作后 `CircuitModel/QASM/仿真结果` 三者同步更新。
  - _Leverage: Task 4 history service, existing `runSimulation` flow_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 3_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: React Feature Integrator | Task: Integrate undo/redo/clear controls into CircuitWorkbenchPage and guarantee synchronized updates of circuit, qasm, and probability results with tests | Restrictions: 不破坏当前图形与 QASM 双向联动，不将业务逻辑塞进纯展示组件，不跳过失败状态展示 | _Leverage: current workbench state orchestration and scheduler flow | _Requirements: Requirement 3 | Success: 三类操作可用、状态一致、回归测试稳定 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 6. 优化 QASM 联动稳定性与中间态编辑体验
  - File: `frontend/src/components/circuit/QasmEditorPane.tsx`, `frontend/src/tests/qasm-editor-pane.test.tsx`
  - 明确“仅在防抖后解析”的触发路径，避免等价内容重复触发同步。
  - 保证中间态输入不阻断、不覆盖文本，解析恢复后自动清错并同步。
  - _Leverage: `frontend/src/features/circuit/qasm/qasm-bridge.ts`, existing debounce behavior_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 4_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend Editor Engineer | Task: Harden QASM editor synchronization to reduce jitter, preserve in-progress text, and resume model sync only on valid parse with updated tests | Restrictions: 不改变 QASM 子集语义，不吞掉解析错误，不引入额外编辑器依赖 | _Leverage: existing debounce parse implementation and bridge parser | _Requirements: Requirement 4 | Success: 编辑不抖动、无效输入不污染模型、恢复后自动同步 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 7. 扩展概率视图为“过滤/全部”双模式并公开阈值信息
  - File: `frontend/src/features/circuit/simulation/probability-filter.ts`, `frontend/src/tests/probability-filter.test.ts`
  - 在现有过滤逻辑上补充“全部状态视图”支持与统计结构。
  - 输出阈值 `epsilon`、可见/隐藏数量、概率和等展示所需字段。
  - _Leverage: current epsilon rule and filter tests_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Numerical Frontend Engineer | Task: Extend probability view utilities to support both filtered and all-state modes while preserving epsilon semantics and statistics correctness | Restrictions: 不改动 epsilon 公式，不容忍 NaN/负概率，不降低现有校验强度 | _Leverage: existing probability-filter implementation and tests | _Requirements: Requirement 5 | Success: 双模式数据结构稳定、统计正确、单测覆盖新增模式 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 8. 页面接入结果显示模式切换与阈值说明
  - File: `frontend/src/pages/CircuitWorkbenchPage.tsx`, `frontend/src/components/ResultChart.tsx`, `frontend/src/tests/workbench-page.test.tsx`
  - 增加“仅显示过滤后/显示全部”切换控件。
  - 在结果区域展示阈值公式、阈值数值与统计说明，并保持空态提示。
  - _Leverage: Task 7 probability utilities, existing chart rendering_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 5_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend Visualization Engineer | Task: Integrate result display mode toggles and epsilon explanation into the workbench with chart updates and regression tests | Restrictions: 不移除现有图表组件，不引入后端调用，不将统计逻辑散落在多个组件 | _Leverage: existing ResultChart and workbench result section | _Requirements: Requirement 5 | Success: 用户可切换显示模式并理解阈值含义，结果区信息完整 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 9. 新增模板服务与首次引导偏好存储
  - File: `frontend/src/features/circuit/model/templates.ts`, `frontend/src/features/circuit/ui/guide-preference.ts`, `frontend/src/tests/workbench-page.test.tsx`
  - 提供至少 Bell 模板并定义模板元数据。
  - 持久化“引导是否已关闭”偏好，支持首次展示和后续不重复打扰。
  - _Leverage: `INITIAL_CIRCUIT` pattern in workbench page_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 6_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend Product Engineer | Task: Add built-in circuit templates and first-time guide preference storage with tests for load and dismiss behavior | Restrictions: 不接入远程模板源，不保存敏感信息，不做静默失败处理 | _Leverage: existing initial circuit model and local frontend patterns | _Requirements: Requirement 6 | Success: 模板可一键加载，引导仅首次弹出且可记忆关闭状态 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 10. 新增工作台草稿持久化服务
  - File: `frontend/src/features/circuit/ui/draft-storage.ts`, `frontend/src/tests/workbench-page.test.tsx`
  - 定义草稿载荷版本与校验逻辑，支持保存/读取/清空。
  - 对损坏或不兼容草稿执行显式忽略并回退默认线路。
  - _Leverage: `CircuitModel` types, existing initialization and reset flow_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 7_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend Reliability Engineer | Task: Implement local draft storage service with schema validation, versioning, and safe fallback behavior plus tests | Restrictions: 不保存 token/认证信息，不在解析失败时静默伪成功，不依赖后端存储 | _Leverage: existing circuit model and workbench init/reset behavior | _Requirements: Requirement 7 | Success: 草稿可恢复，异常草稿可识别并安全回退，测试覆盖损坏数据场景 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_

- [ ] 11. 组装模板/引导/草稿能力到工作台并完成文档更新
  - File: `frontend/src/pages/CircuitWorkbenchPage.tsx`, `README.md`, `docs/project-status-and-usage.md`
  - 将模板加载、首次引导、草稿恢复/重置整合到工作台主流程。
  - 更新项目使用文档，补充新的交互入口与快捷操作说明。
  - _Leverage: Tasks 9-10 services, existing project usage docs_
  - _Requirements: Requirement 6, Requirement 7_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec workbench-ux-iteration, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Frontend Integrator & Docs Engineer | Task: Integrate template/guide/draft capabilities into the main workbench flow and update user-facing docs accordingly | Restrictions: 不新增后端 API，不改变现有认证路由，不写与实现不一致的文档 | _Leverage: workbench page orchestration and existing README/project-status docs | _Requirements: Requirement 6, Requirement 7 | Success: 功能在页面可用且文档可复现实操流程 | Instructions: 开始前将对应任务标记为 `[-]`，完成实现后调用 `log-implementation` 记录产物，最后将任务标记为 `[x]`_
